theme_and_archetype.reasoning: An accounting portal for non-technical small business owners needs to feel trustworthy, calm, and approachable. We avoid cold 'fintech-bro' dark modes or sterile corporate interfaces in favor of a warm, human-centric design.

spacing_and_layout.mobile_constraints: Buttons and touch targets strictly minimum 44x44px. Bottom sheets preferred over modals for mobile workflows.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Bento-style layout. Mobile: grid-cols-1 gap-6. Desktop: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Cards must have internal padding of p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision. Max width for client content should be max-w-2xl to maintain focus.

component_guidelines.buttons: Large, soft-rounded (rounded-xl). Primary actions use Brand Primary (#214C37). Must include data-testid. Hover state must explicitly shift background to a darker hue.
component_guidelines.cards: Neumorphic clay style. Background pure white (#FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#E7E5E4), soft shadow (shadow-sm). Max border-radius 12px.
component_guidelines.inputs_and_forms: High contrast borders. Focus state must use ring-2 ring-primary/50. No floating labels. Use clear, large labels above inputs.
component_guidelines.upload_scanner: Do not rely on drag-and-drop on mobile. Prominent 'Take Photo / Upload' buttons. Real-time visual feedback (spinner for 1-3s, success checkmark). Do not use red text for errors, use amber/warning colors.
component_guidelines.tables: Admin only. Dense mode. Left-aligned text. Sticky headers with subtle background tint (bg-stone-50).

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-[1px]) and shadow increase (shadow-md) on cards.
motion_and_interaction.active: Scale down (scale-[0.98]) on buttons for haptic-like visual feedback.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for basic state changes.

specific_views.client_dashboard: Clean UI with two massive bento-box action buttons: 'Purchase Invoices' and 'Sales Invoices'. Display count as massive numeric typography (text-5xl font-light) inside the button/card.
specific_views.client_outstanding_list: List items acting as touchable rows. Status indicators (Outstanding in amber, Submitted in green). Search bar prominent at the top.
specific_views.client_submission_screen: Three dominant actions stacked vertically: 'Take Photo', 'Upload Photo', 'No Photo Needed'. Dynamic comment section that becomes mandatory if 'No Photo' is selected. Includes logic for semi-transparent watermark on stamped image.
specific_views.admin_dashboard: Data-dense 'Control Room' grid. Client list with quick search, quick CSV upload module with immediate validation feedback. Global filter for viewing submissions.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 on all text. Avoid gray-on-gray.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='upload-invoice-btn').
accessibility.focus: Visible focus outlines required on all focusable elements (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2).

login_background.description: Warm, neutral textured paper surface to create a tactile, stress-free entry point.

admin_empty_state.description: Small business owner at a desk working - used sparingly as an empty state illustration for the admin client list.

media.rules: Use lucide-react for standard icons. Avoid stock illustrations; rely on the provided imagery and clean typography.
